---
title: "Hopping of CBS-Sox2P constructs from LP-116kb"
author: "Mathias Eder"
date: "2026-03-02"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: journal #cerulean
    highlight: monochrome
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
  editor_options:
    chunk_output_type: console
---

# Nomenclature
When generating the datasets for this hopping experiments, we named the data often with their plasmid names.
Here is a short translator for the nomenclature:
pME034 --> Sox2P insert
pMK01 --> 3xCBS_Fw_Sox2P insert
pMK02 --> 3xCBS_Rv_Sox2P insert
pMK03 --> 1xCBS_Fw_Sox2P insert


# Script to generate the following figures
- fig S1B
- fig S1C
- fig S1E
- fig 2C
- fig S2B-S2E
- fig 2D
- fig S2A
- fig S2A
- fig S5G
- fig 6D
- fig S2F-S2I


# Set-up
##Libraries
Load the libraries and set the parameters.
```{r load_libraries}

# Load dependencies
library(GenomicRanges)
library(rtracklayer)
library(gtools)
library(tidyverse)
library(dtplyr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggbeeswarm)
library(ggplot2)
#library(broom)
library(Biostrings)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
#library(tagMeppr)
#library(withr)
library(knitr)
library(RColorBrewer)
#library(tagmapAnalyseR)
# library(UpSetR)
# library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(purrr)
# library(ggpubr)
# library(cowplot)
library(RcppRoll)
library(viridis)
library(plotly)
library(GGally)
library(cowplot)
library(ggh4x)
library(ggsignif)

split_string <- function(vect,sep,N1,N2=N1){
  library(stringr)
  sapply(vect, function(X){
    paste(str_split(X,sep)[[1]][N1:N2],collapse = sep)
  },USE.NAMES = F)
}
```

## Paths & parameters
```{r paths_parameters}
#datatag
datetag = paste0("ME",format(Sys.time(), '%Y%m%d'))

# Prepare output 
output_dir <- paste0("analysis_",datetag)
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

```

```{r knits setup}

library(knitr)
opts_chunk$set(fig.width = 20, fig.height = 8, cache = T,
               message = F, warning = F,
               dev=c('png', 'pdf'), 
               fig.path = file.path(output_dir, "figures/")) 
pdf.options(useDingbats = FALSE)
```

# File paths
```{r}

path_CTCF_sites = "/DATA/usr/v.franceschini/Workspaces/2024_01_MATHIAS_CTCF_PEAKS/VF240812_calling_CTCF_motifs_again/02_OUTPUTS/CTCF_sites/6764_2_ME_E2_CGATGT_S2_R1_001_peaks_motifs.bed"

path_tib_23_ints = "/DATA/projects/Sox2/GEO_collection/Tagmentation/still_to_upload/mapped_integrations_-116kb_Sox2P_pools.txt"
path_tib_CTCF_Sox2P = "/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/GEO_collection/filename_ints_116kb_CBS_Sox2P.tsv"


path_median_mTurq_relevant_cell_lines = "/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/Info_files/me20250707_median_mTurq_mCherry_GFP_sorting_all.tsv"
path_sorting_stats = "/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/Info_files/me20250707_stats_for_expression_score_mCherry.tsv"

```

#Load functions
```{r load functions}
source("/DATA/projects/Sox2/General_functions/CM20240621_general_plotting_functions.R")
source("/DATA/projects/Sox2/General_functions/CM20250318_new_expression_score_functions.R")
```

# Relevant annotations
```{r element_coordinates}

# Location of enhancer / gene
enhancer <- GRanges(seqnames = "chr3", 
                    ranges = IRanges(start = 34753415,
                                     end = 34766401),
                    strand = "*")

#gene based on mm10, ucsc browser, RefSeq annotation
# Sox2
# chr3:34649995-34652461 (+)
# id = NM_011443.4

Sox2_gene <- GRanges(seqnames = "chr3", 
                    ranges = IRanges(start = 34649995,
                                     end = 34652461),
                    strand = "+")

landingPad_23 <- GRanges(seqnames = "chr3", 
                    ranges = IRanges(start = 34643960,
                                     end = 34643962),
                    strand = "+")

landingPad_8 <- GRanges(seqnames = "chr3", 
                    ranges = IRanges(start = 34721183,
                                     end = 34721184),
                    strand = "+")


LP_tib = tibble(landing_pad = c("LP23", "LP8"), 
                start = c( start(landingPad_23),start(landingPad_8)))

# Add annotations from Brosh paper
Brosh <- import.bed('/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/external_datasets/annotations_Brosh_paper/enhancer_elements_Brosh2023_Sox2_V2.bed')


#CTCF sites based on our own mapping
# new analysis (based on mapping to mm10 only)
CTCF_mm10_new <- import.bed('/DATA/usr/v.franceschini/Workspaces/2024_01_MATHIAS_CTCF_PEAKS/VF240812_calling_CTCF_motifs_again/02_OUTPUTS/CTCF_sites/6764_2_ME_E2_CGATGT_S2_R1_001_peaks_motifs.bed')

#filtering:
CTCF_mm10.chr3 <- CTCF_mm10_new[seqnames(CTCF_mm10_new)== 'chr3']
# add the missing site after the SCR
CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra = sort(c(CTCF_mm10.chr3,
                         GRanges(seqnames = "chr3",
                                 IRanges(start = 34772210, end = 34772210),
                                 strand = "+")),
                         ignore.strand = T)


prange_zoom = c(34500000 , 35000000)
prange2 = c(34000000, 35500000)
prange_far = c(32000000, 37000000)
#zoom in on only the SCR +- 50kb
prange_LP = c(start(landingPad_23)-5E4, end(landingPad_23)+5E4)
prange_SCR = c(start(enhancer)-5E4, end(enhancer)+5E4)
prange_plot = c(32643960, 36643960) #+/- 2MB from landing pad
prange_loop = c(34631804, 34778268)
prange_zoom = c(34.5E6, 35E6)
prange_zoom_paper = c(34.59E6, 34.83E6)
prange_SCR = c(34.725E6, 34.785E6)
range_2Mb = c(33.643960E6, 35.643960E6)
# Focus on peak around the SCR
prange_ChIP = c(34611804,34810000)
```

## Colour setup
```{r}
myCols_insert_cell_line <- c(
  `23_MK01_C5` = '#1b9e77',   # Teal green
  `23_MK02_C2` = '#d95f02',   # Strong orange
  `23_MK03_C1` = '#7570b3',   # Purple
  `23_34A` = 'black', # blue for ctrl cell line
  `8_MK01_C1` = '#1b9e77',   # Teal green
  `8_MK01_C2` = '#1b9e77',   # Teal green
  `8_MK02_C5` = '#d95f02',   # Strong orange
  `8_MK03_C3` = '#7570b3',   # Purple
  `8_34` = 'black' # blue for ctrl cell line
)

col_scale_MK_CL <- scale_colour_manual(
  name = "cell_line", 
  values = myCols_insert_cell_line,
  aesthetics = c("colour", "fill")
)
```


# Load data
```{r}

#load the -116kb data (LP23)
tib_23_all_data = read_tsv(path_tib_23_ints) %>%
  filter(chr %in% paste0("chr", c(1:19, "X"))) %>%
  mutate(chr = factor(chr, levels = paste0("chr", c(1:19, "X")))) 

#the control pool in E2285 (rep3) was sequenced as 10 separate libraries, combine them into one sample
tib_23_E2285_ctrls = tib_23_all_data %>%
  filter(replicate == "rep3" & insert == "Sox2P" & sample_type == "control pool") %>%
  mutate(sample_name = "Sox2P-reporter -116 kb, unsorted control pool rep3")%>%
  group_by(chr, start, end, seq, strand, replicate, experiment, launch_pad_location, insert, genotype, sample_type, sorted_gate, pool_nr) %>%
  summarize(read_count = sum(read_count),
            read_count_1 = sum(read_count_1),
            read_count_2 = sum(read_count_2), .groups = "keep") 

tib_23 = tib_23_all_data %>%
  #select the rest of the data
  filter(!(replicate == "rep3" & insert == "Sox2P" & sample_type == "control pool")) %>%
  select(chr, start, end, seq, strand, replicate, experiment, launch_pad_location, insert, genotype, sample_type, sorted_gate, pool_nr, 
         read_count, read_count_1, read_count_2)%>%
  #add merged controls back in
  bind_rows(tib_23_E2285_ctrls) %>%
  #mark hopped integrations
  mutate(hopped = start != 34643961,
         cell_line = "23_34A") %>%
 filter(!(start >= 34721183 & start <= 34721192)) #filter contamination from LP8


# Load CTCF_Sox2P data
tib_CTCF_Sox2P = read_tsv("/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/Integrations_files/pools_ints_CTCF_Sox2P.tsv") %>%
  filter(chr %in% paste0("chr", c(1:19, "X"))) %>%
  mutate(chr = factor(chr, levels = paste0("chr", c(1:19, "X")))) %>% 
  mutate(LP = case_when(experiment == "E2292" ~ "LP8",
                        .default = "LP23"),
         hopped = case_when(LP == "LP8" ~ start  < 34721183 | start > 34721192,
                            LP == "LP23" ~ start != 34643961)) %>%
  select(chr, start, end, seq, strand, replicate, experiment, launch_pad_location, insert, genotype, sample_type, sorted_gate, pool_nr,
         read_count, read_count_1, read_count_2, hopped, cell_line)


# Filter integrations
tib_filtered = bind_rows(tib_23, tib_CTCF_Sox2P) %>%
  #add variables used in the plotting (old names of cell lines etc) 
  mutate(population_tmp = case_when(sample_type == "control pool" ~ "ctrl",
                                .default = sorted_gate),
         population = case_when(population_tmp == "P01" ~ "P1",
                                population_tmp == "P56" ~ "P5",
                                .default = population_tmp),
         landing_pad = case_when(launch_pad_location == "-116 kb" ~ "LP23",
                                 launch_pad_location == "-39 kb" ~ "LP8")) %>%
  #annotate confidence of mapping (one or both ITRs)
  mutate(mapped_arms = case_when(read_count_1 == 0 ~ "rv_only",
                                 read_count_2 == 0 ~ "fw_only",
                                 read_count_1 > 0 & read_count_2 > 0 ~ "both_arms")) %>%
  
  #filter the data
  filter(population == "ctrl" | read_count >= 2) %>% #for ctrl distribution 1 mapping read is enough
  filter(strand %in% c("+", "-")) %>%
  select(-c(population_tmp))

# quick check
table(tib_filtered$cell_line, tib_filtered$population)
table(tib_filtered$population, tib_filtered$chr)

tib_filtered %>% filter(chr == "chr3") %>%
  group_by(population, cell_line) %>% tally() %>% spread(cell_line, n)

tib_filtered_P1_strict = tib_filtered %>%
  filter(!(population == "P1" & mapped_arms != "both_arms")) %>% #only keep P1 integrations with 2 mapped arms
  filter(!(population == "P0" & mapped_arms != "both_arms")) %>% #only keep P0 integrations with 2 mapped arms from LP-39kb
  mutate(population = factor(population)) 
```

## Remove contamination of E2401
```{r}
tib_E2401 = tib_filtered %>% filter(experiment == "E2401")

# Find regions of contaminated integrations
top_dupl_locations = tib_E2401 %>% 
  filter(chr == "chr3" & hopped & strand != "*") %>% 
  group_by(start, strand) %>% 
  summarize(N_samples_found = n()) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  slice_max(N_samples_found, n = 18)

top_dupl_locations_2 = tib_E2401 %>% 
  filter(chr =="chr3" & hopped & strand != "*") %>% 
  group_by(start, strand) %>% 
  summarize(N_cell_lines_found = length(unique(cell_line))) %>% 
  filter(N_cell_lines_found == 3)

top_combined = top_dupl_locations %>% left_join(top_dupl_locations_2, by = c("start", "strand"))
#Note:
# In this way we find 2200 integrations in the three cell lines that can be found from 149 times to 37 times.
# all of the 18 hits are found in all 3 cell lines


# Remove integrations from data
tib_E2401_curated <- tib_E2401 %>%
  filter(
    ! (start  %in% top_dupl_locations$start &
       strand %in% top_dupl_locations$strand)
  )

#filter without old E2401
tib_filtered_1 = tib_filtered %>% filter(experiment != "E2401")

tib_filtered_curated = bind_rows(tib_filtered_1, tib_E2401_curated)

tib_filtered_curated_strict = tib_filtered_curated %>%
  filter(!(population == "P1" & mapped_arms != "both_arms")) %>% #only keep P1 integrations with 2 mapped arms
  filter(!(population == "P0" & mapped_arms != "both_arms")) %>% #only keep P0 integrations with 2 mapped arms at LP-39kb
  mutate(population = factor(population)) 

#saveRDS(tib_filtered_curated_strict, file = "tib_filtered_curated_strict.rds")
```

#Expression data
```{r}
#load median expression values (from sorting pdfs)
median_sorted_mTurq = read_tsv(path_median_mTurq_relevant_cell_lines) %>% 
  select(experiment, cell_line, mCh_status, population, replicate, construct, mCherry_selection, mTurq, mCherry, GFP)

#get a general mTurq level per gate, for the mCh+ hopping
general_mTurq_mChpos = median_sorted_mTurq %>% 
  filter(str_detect(population, "^P\\d+")) %>%
  filter(mCherry_selection == "mCh+") %>%
  group_by(cell_line, population, construct, mCherry_selection) %>%
  summarise(mTurq_mean = mean(mTurq),
            mCherry_mean = mean(mCherry),
            GFP_mean = mean(GFP)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(cell_line, population, mTurq_mean, mCherry_mean, GFP_mean)

#add mTurq values to the integration tibble
tib_filtered_FACS_vals = left_join(tib_filtered_curated_strict, general_mTurq_mChpos, by = join_by(cell_line, population)) %>%
  filter(population != "ctrl") %>%
   dplyr::rename(mTurq_expr_gate = mTurq_mean,
                 mCh_expr_gate = mCherry_mean) 

#check that all integrations have a fluorescence value:
tib_filtered_FACS_vals %>% filter(is.na(mTurq_expr_gate))
```

#Sorting statistics
```{r}
sorting_stats_tib_raw = read_tsv(path_sorting_stats) 

sorting_stats_tib = sorting_stats_tib_raw %>%
  mutate(recorded_fraction = (recorded_count + 1)/total_recorded) %>% #recorded fraction with psuedocount of 1
  mutate(weigh_factor = recorded_fraction / sorted_count, 
         weigh_factor_1M = weigh_factor * 1E6) # weigh factor 1M is just to make the factor more easily human readable
```

```{r}
# number or replications per population
sorting_stats_tib_repN = sorting_stats_tib %>%
  filter(cell_line %in% c("23_34A", "23_MK01_C5", "23_MK02_C2", "23_MK03_C1")) %>%
  group_by(cell_line, population) %>%
  summarize(N_reps = n()) %>% #number of reps per population per cell line
  group_by(cell_line) %>%
  mutate(min_reps_CL = min(N_reps) ) %>% #least replicated population
  mutate(rep_weigh_factor = min_reps_CL/N_reps) #scale the other populations to the least replicated pop

# adjust weigh factor by the replicate weigh factor
sorting_stats_tib_repcor = 
  sorting_stats_tib %>%
  left_join(sorting_stats_tib_repN) %>%
  mutate(weigh_factor_old = weigh_factor,
         weigh_factor = weigh_factor_old * rep_weigh_factor)
```

```{r}
tib_filtered_FACS_vals %>% 
  filter(cell_line %in% c("23_34A", "23_MK01_C5", "23_MK02_C2", "23_MK03_C1")) %>%
  group_by(cell_line, experiment, replicate, population) %>%
  filter(hopped) %>%
  summarize(N_ints = n()) %>%
  left_join(sorting_stats_tib)
```

#Functions
```{r}
# Plotting ranges
prange_zoom = c(34.5E6, 35E6)
prange_zoom_paper = c(34.59E6, 34.83E6)
prange_SCR = c(34.725E6, 34.785E6)


# Color annotations
## SCR 
brown = "#ffb000"

#color schemes
myCols_blue = c('#525252', "#080E5B",  "#212B71", "#3A4987", "#465893", "#5A719A", "#6C8AA0")
names(myCols_blue) = c("ctrl", paste0("P", 1:6))
colScale7_blue <- scale_colour_manual(name = "population", values = myCols_blue)
fillScale7_blue <- scale_fill_manual(name = "population", values = myCols_blue)

myCols_blue_strand = c( "#080E5B", "#5A719A")
names(myCols_blue_strand) = c("+","-")
colScale2_blue <- scale_colour_manual(name = "strand", values = myCols_blue_strand)
fillScale2_blue <- scale_fill_manual(name = "strand", values = myCols_blue_strand)

```

#Create color palette for different cell lines
```{r}
myCols_green = c('#525252',"#0A3F30", "#175643", "#246D58", "#30846B", "#3D9B7E", "#49B292")
names(myCols_green) = c("ctrl", paste0("P", 1:6))
colScale7_green <- scale_colour_manual(name = "population", values = myCols_green)
fillScale7_green <- scale_fill_manual(name = "population", values = myCols_green)

myCols_orange = c('#525252', "#572601", "#72380B", "#8F4A15", "#AA5C20", "#C66D2A", "#E07F34")
names(myCols_orange) = c("ctrl", paste0("P", 1:6))
colScale7_orange <- scale_colour_manual(name = "population", values = myCols_orange)
fillScale7_orange <- scale_fill_manual(name = "population", values = myCols_orange)

myCols_purple = c('#525252', "#2E2D47", "#424060", "#565378", "#696791", "#7D7AA9", "#918DC2")
names(myCols_purple) = c("ctrl", paste0("P", 1:6))
colScale7_purple <- scale_colour_manual(name = "population", values = myCols_purple)
fillScale7_purple <- scale_fill_manual(name = "population", values = myCols_purple)
```

```{r}
all_exp = unique(tib_filtered_curated_strict$experiment)
```

## Plotting Beeswarm function
```{r}
plot_beeswarm_only = function(TIB, CL = "23_34A", EXP = all_exp, P_RANGE = prange_zoom,
                              PLOT_CTCF = F, PLOT_ANNOT = T,
                              TITLE = NULL, POINT_SIZE = 0.75, RANDOM_METHOD = "quasirandom",
                              NEXT_RANGE = NULL){
  tib_for_plot = filter(TIB, hopped & chr == "chr3" & cell_line %in% CL & experiment %in% EXP & start >= P_RANGE[1] & start <= P_RANGE[2])
  LP_tib_cl = select(tib_for_plot, c(cell_line, landing_pad)) %>% 
    distinct() %>% left_join(LP_tib)
  
  ggplot(filter(tib_for_plot, hopped & chr == "chr3" & cell_line %in% CL & experiment %in% EXP),
         aes(x = start, y = population, col = population)) +
    {if(length(CL)>1) facet_grid(cell_line ~ .)} +  #only facet when necessary

    {if (PLOT_ANNOT)
      list( #add elements in a list, you cannot use + inside an if statement
        # annotate enhancer
        geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(enhancer), end(enhancer)), col = brown),
        annotate("rect", xmin = start(enhancer), xmax = end(enhancer), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = brown),
        # annotate gene
        annotate("rect", xmin = start(Sox2_gene), xmax = end(Sox2_gene), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = 'red'),
        geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(Sox2_gene), end(Sox2_gene)), col = 'red') )} +
    
     #annotate landing pad
    {if(PLOT_ANNOT & length(CL)== 1)
      geom_vline(xintercept = pull(
        filter(LP_tib, landing_pad %in% unique(tib_for_plot$landing_pad)), 
        start),
        col = 'darkgrey')} +
    {if(PLOT_ANNOT & length(CL) > 1)
       geom_vline(data = LP_tib_cl, aes(xintercept = start), col = 'darkgrey')} +

    # # annotate CTCFs
    {if(PLOT_CTCF)geom_vline(xintercept = start(CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra), col = 'darkgrey', lty="11")}+
    {if(!is.null(NEXT_RANGE)) geom_rug(data = tibble(range = NEXT_RANGE),
                                       aes(x = range),
                                       fill = 'grey',
                                       inherit.aes = F)}+
    
    
    #datapoints
    geom_quasirandom(alpha = 0.5, size = POINT_SIZE, varwidth = T, bandwidth = 0.8,
                     # shape = 16, #changes to point without border, so alpha applies to the whole point
                     method = RANDOM_METHOD,
                     stroke = NA) +
    geom_text(data = plyr::count(tib_for_plot, vars = c("cell_line", "population")), aes(label = paste("n = ", freq, sep = ""),
                                                                                         x = Inf),
              hjust = "inward", vjust = "top",
              col = 'black') +
    
    #layout:
    labs(x='Genomic coordinate (Mb)',y='sorted gate') +
    theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
    theme(legend.position = "none") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6), labels = scales::unit_format(scale = 1E-6, accuracy = 0.01, unit=NULL),
                       limits=P_RANGE, expand=c(0,0)) +
    scale_y_discrete(limits = rev, drop=F) +
    ggtitle(TITLE) +
    ## CHANGED: choose the appropriate colour scale based on CL
    { if (length(CL)==1) {
        switch(CL,
          "23_34A"       = colScale7_blue,
          "23_MK01_C5"   = colScale7_green,
          "23_MK02_C2"   = colScale7_orange,
          "23_MK03_C1"   = colScale7_purple,
          colScale7_blue  # default fallback
        )
      } else {
        colScale7_blue  # when faceting multiple lines, fall back to blue (or choose your own default)
      }
    }
}
```

## Figure 2C, S2A - Scatterplot of integrations
```{r Figure 2C, S2A}
# Plot Sox2P
pSox2P_bs =
plot_beeswarm_only(TIB = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
                   filter(hopped & chr == "chr3" & population != "P0") %>% droplevels(),
                   EXP = all_exp, 
                   CL = "23_34A",
                   PLOT_ANNOT = T,
                   PLOT_CTCF = F,
                   P_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper,
                   POINT_SIZE = 1.5)

# Plot 1xCBS_Fw_Sox2P
p1xCBS_Fw_Sox2P_bs =
plot_beeswarm_only(TIB = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
                   filter(hopped & chr == "chr3" & population != "P0") %>% droplevels(),
                   EXP = all_exp, 
                   CL = "23_MK03_C1",
                   PLOT_ANNOT = T,
                   PLOT_CTCF = F,
                   P_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper,
                   POINT_SIZE = 1.5)


# Plot 3xCBS_Fw_Sox2P
p3xCBS_Fw_Sox2P_bs =
plot_beeswarm_only(TIB = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
                   filter(hopped & chr == "chr3" & population != "P0") %>% droplevels(),
                   EXP = all_exp, 
                   CL = "23_MK01_C5",
                   PLOT_ANNOT = T,
                   PLOT_CTCF = F,
                   P_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper,
                   POINT_SIZE = 1.5)

# Plot 3xCBS_Rv_Sox2P
p3xCBS_Rv_Sox2P_bs =
plot_beeswarm_only(TIB = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
                   filter(hopped & chr == "chr3" & population != "P0") %>% droplevels(),
                   EXP = all_exp, 
                   CL = "23_MK02_C2",
                   PLOT_ANNOT = T,
                   PLOT_CTCF = F,
                   P_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper,
                   POINT_SIZE = 1.5)

# Plot 1xCBS_Fw_Sox2P
p1xCBS_Fw_Sox2P_bs =
plot_beeswarm_only(TIB = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
                   filter(hopped & chr == "chr3" & population != "P0") %>% droplevels(),
                   EXP = all_exp, 
                   CL = "23_MK03_C1",
                   PLOT_ANNOT = T,
                   PLOT_CTCF = F,
                   P_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper,
                   POINT_SIZE = 1.5)

plot_grid(pSox2P_bs, p1xCBS_Fw_Sox2P_bs, p3xCBS_Fw_Sox2P_bs, p3xCBS_Rv_Sox2P_bs, align = "hv", nrow = 1)
```

# Strand based beeswarm function
```{r stranded beeswarm}
plot_beeswarm_only_stranded = function(TIB, CL = "23_34A", EXP = all_exp, P_RANGE = prange_zoom,
                              PLOT_CTCF = FALSE, PLOT_ANNOT = TRUE,
                              SPLIT_STRAND = FALSE,
                              TITLE = NULL, POINT_SIZE = 0.75, RANDOM_METHOD = "quasirandom",
                              NEXT_RANGE = NULL){
  
  # 1) subset once
  tib_for_plot <- TIB %>%
    filter(hopped, chr == "chr3",
           cell_line %in% CL, experiment %in% EXP,
           between(start, P_RANGE[1], P_RANGE[2]))
  
  # 2) landing‐pad join (unchanged)
  LP_tib_cl <- tib_for_plot %>%
    distinct(cell_line, landing_pad) %>%
    left_join(LP_tib, by = "landing_pad")
  
  # 3) compute counts *with* strand if requested
  if (SPLIT_STRAND) {
    count_df <- tib_for_plot %>%
      count(cell_line, strand, population)
  } else {
    count_df <- tib_for_plot %>%
      count(cell_line, population)
  }
  
 
  # 4) now build the plot
  ggplot(tib_for_plot,
         aes(x = start, y = population, col = population)) +
    
    # faceting
    {
      if (SPLIT_STRAND) {
        if (length(CL) > 1) facet_grid(cell_line ~ strand)
        else                facet_wrap(~ strand)
      } else {
        if (length(CL) > 1) facet_grid(cell_line ~ .)
        else                NULL
      }
    } +
    
    # (all your annotations go here, unchanged) … +
    {if (PLOT_ANNOT)
      list( #add elements in a list, you cannot use + inside an if statement
        # annotate enhancer
        geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(enhancer), end(enhancer)), col = brown),
        annotate("rect", xmin = start(enhancer), xmax = end(enhancer), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = brown),
        # annotate LP
        geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_8), col = "black", linetype = "dotted"), 
        geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_23), col = "black", linetype = "dotted"),
        
        # annotate gene
        annotate("rect", xmin = start(Sox2_gene), xmax = end(Sox2_gene), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = 'red'),
        geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(Sox2_gene), end(Sox2_gene)), col = 'red') )} +
    
    # # annotate CTCFs
    {if(PLOT_CTCF)geom_vline(xintercept = start(CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra), col = 'darkgrey', lty="11")}+
    {if(!is.null(NEXT_RANGE)) geom_rug(data = tibble(range = NEXT_RANGE),
                                       aes(x = range),
                                       fill = 'grey',
                                       inherit.aes = F)}+
    
    geom_quasirandom(alpha = 0.5, size = POINT_SIZE, varwidth = TRUE,
                     bandwidth = 0.8, method = RANDOM_METHOD, stroke = NA) +
    
    # 5) the *only* geom_text, pointing at count_df
    geom_text(
      data = count_df,
      aes(label = paste0("n = ", n), x = Inf),
      hjust = "inward", vjust = "top",
      col = 'black'
    ) +
    
    # 6) scales / theme / title (unchanged) …
    labs(x = 'Genomic coordinate (Mb)', y = 'sorted gate') +
    theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
    theme(legend.position = "none") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6), labels = scales::unit_format(scale = 1E-6, accuracy = 0.01, unit=NULL),
                       limits=P_RANGE, expand=c(0,0)) +
    scale_y_discrete(limits = rev, drop=F) +
    ggtitle(TITLE) +
    ## CHANGED: choose the appropriate colour scale based on CL
    { if (length(CL)==1) {
        switch(CL,
          "23_34A"       = colScale7_blue,
          "23_MK01_C5"   = colScale7_green,
          "23_MK02_C2"   = colScale7_orange,
          "23_MK03_C1"   = colScale7_purple,
          colScale7_blue  # default fallback
        )
      } else {
        colScale7_blue  # when faceting multiple lines, fall back to blue (or choose your own default)
      }
    }
    
}

```

## Plot Beeswarm of stranded integrations Fig. S2B-S2E
```{r figure S2B-S2E}
# Plot Sox2P stranded
pBS_Sox2P_stranded = 
plot_beeswarm_only_stranded(TIB = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
                              filter(hopped & chr == "chr3" & experiment %in% all_exp) %>% 
                              droplevels(),
                   CL = c("23_34A"),
                   SPLIT_STRAND = T, 
                   PLOT_ANNOT = T,
                   PLOT_CTCF = F,
                   P_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper,
                   POINT_SIZE = 1.5,
                   NEXT_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper
)
pBS_Sox2P_stranded

# Plot 3xCBS_Fw_Sox2P stranded
pBS_3xCBS_Fw_Sox2P_stranded = 
plot_beeswarm_only_stranded(TIB = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
                              filter(hopped & chr == "chr3" & experiment %in% all_exp) %>% 
                              droplevels(),
                   CL = c("23_MK01_C5"),
                   SPLIT_STRAND = T, 
                   PLOT_ANNOT = T,
                   PLOT_CTCF = F,
                   P_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper,
                   POINT_SIZE = 1.5,
                   NEXT_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper
)
pBS_3xCBS_Fw_Sox2P_stranded

# Plot 3xCBS_Rv_Sox2P stranded
pBS_3xCBS_Rv_Sox2P_stranded = 
plot_beeswarm_only_stranded(TIB = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
                              filter(hopped & chr == "chr3" & experiment %in% all_exp) %>% 
                              droplevels(),
                   CL = c("23_MK02_C2"),
                   SPLIT_STRAND = T, 
                   PLOT_ANNOT = T,
                   PLOT_CTCF = F,
                   P_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper,
                   POINT_SIZE = 1.5,
                   NEXT_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper
                   )
pBS_3xCBS_Rv_Sox2P_stranded

# Plot 1xCBS_Fw_Sox2P stranded
pBS_1xCBS_Fw_Sox2P_stranded = 
plot_beeswarm_only_stranded(TIB = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
                              filter(hopped & chr == "chr3" & experiment %in% all_exp) %>% 
                              droplevels(),
                   CL = c("23_MK03_C1"),
                   SPLIT_STRAND = T, 
                   PLOT_ANNOT = T,
                   PLOT_CTCF = F,
                   P_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper,
                   POINT_SIZE = 1.5,
                   NEXT_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper
)
pBS_1xCBS_Fw_Sox2P_stranded

# Plot stranded integrations together
plot_grid(pBS_Sox2P_stranded, pBS_1xCBS_Fw_Sox2P_stranded, pBS_3xCBS_Fw_Sox2P_stranded,pBS_3xCBS_Rv_Sox2P_stranded, ncol = 2, axis = "lb", align = "vh")
```


#Expression score
## Sox2P
```{r}
#all combined, 5kb window
set.seed(20240331)
min_ints_window = 3
N_bootstrap = 1000
BinSize = 1000
all_exp = unique(tib_filtered_FACS_vals$experiment)

tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb = tib_filtered_FACS_vals %>% left_join(sorting_stats_tib_repcor)
#saveRDS(tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb, "/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/analysis/RDS_files/tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb.rds")

#calculate running mean on random sample of same size, 1000 times
# expr_score_tib_23_34A = create_bootstrap_tibble(FUN = function(TIB){expr_score_function_new_weigh(TIB,
#                                                                                               binsize = BinSize,
#                                                                                               N_bins_window = 10,
#                                                                                               calculation_window =  prange_zoom,
#                                                                                               CL = "23_34A", EXP = all_exp)},
#                                             TIB = tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb,
#                                             N_resamples = N_bootstrap)

#saveRDS(expr_score_tib_23_34A, "/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/analysis/expression_score_new/ME20250708_new_expression_score_23_34A.rds")
expr_score_tib_23_34A = readRDS("/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/analysis/expression_score_new/ME20250708_new_expression_score_23_34A.rds")

expr_score_sum_tib_23_34A = bootstrap_summary_fun(expr_score_tib_23_34A,
                                           score_column = "expr_score_window",
                                           conf_int = 0.95)

#calculate actual expr score (for filtering # of ints per window)
expr_score_real_23_34A =
  expr_score_function_new_weigh(tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb,
                                binsize = BinSize,
                                N_bins_window = 10,
                                calculation_window =  prange_zoom,
                                CL = "23_34A",
                                EXP = all_exp)
  
expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_34A = left_join(expr_score_sum_tib_23_34A,  expr_score_real_23_34A) %>%
  mutate(expr_score_window_median_sel = case_when(
    total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_median,
    .default = NA),
    expr_score_window_lower_sel = case_when(
      total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_lower,
      .default = NA),
    expr_score_window_upper_sel = case_when(
      total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_upper,
      .default = NA))
```
### Figure 2D
```{r}
pExpr_23_34A = 
ggplot(expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_34A, aes(x = mid_interval)) +
  # annotate enhancer
  list(
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(enhancer), xmax = end(enhancer), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = brown),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(enhancer), end(enhancer)), col = brown),
    # annotate gene
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(Sox2_gene), xmax = end(Sox2_gene), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,alpha = .2, fill = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(Sox2_gene), end(Sox2_gene)), col = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_23), col = 'darkgrey'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra), col = 'darkgrey', linetype = 'dotted')
  ) +

  ## plot the confidence interval based on the resampled data
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = expr_score_window_lower_sel, ymax = expr_score_window_upper_sel), alpha = 0.2, fill = "#080E5B") +
  #geom_line( aes(y = expr_score_window_mean), col = "orange") +
  ## plot the median based on the resampled data
  geom_line(aes(y = expr_score_window_median_sel), col = "#080E5B") +
 
  #axes
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6), labels = scales::unit_format(scale = 1E-6, accuracy = 0.01, unit=NULL),
                     limits=prange_zoom_paper, expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n=6),
                     limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(x='Genomic coordinate (Mb)',y='expression score') +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = 'none')

pExpr_23_34A
```

## 3xCBS_Fw_Sox2P
```{r}
#all combined, 5kb window
set.seed(20240331)
min_ints_window = 3
N_bootstrap = 1000
BinSize = 1000
all_exp = unique(tib_filtered_curated_strict$experiment)

tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb = tib_filtered_FACS_vals %>% left_join(sorting_stats_tib_repcor)


# calculate running mean on random sample of same size, 500 times
# expr_score_tib_23_MK01_C5 = create_bootstrap_tibble(FUN = function(TIB){expr_score_function_new_weigh(TIB,
#                                                                                               binsize = BinSize,
#                                                                                               N_bins_window = 10,
#                                                                                               calculation_window =  prange_zoom,
#                                                                                               CL = "23_MK01_C5", EXP = all_exp)},
#                                             TIB = tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb,
#                                             N_resamples = N_bootstrap)
# 
# saveRDS(expr_score_tib_23_MK01_C5, "/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/analysis/expression_score_new/ME20250708_new_expression_score_23_MK01_C5.rds")
expr_score_tib_23_MK01_C5 = readRDS("/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/analysis/expression_score_new/ME20250708_new_expression_score_23_MK01_C5.rds")

expr_score_sum_tib_23_MK01_C5 = bootstrap_summary_fun(expr_score_tib_23_MK01_C5,
                                           score_column = "expr_score_window",
                                           conf_int = 0.95)

#calculate actual expr score (for filtering # of ints per window)
expr_score_real_23_MK01_C5 =
  expr_score_function_new_weigh(tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb,
                                binsize = BinSize,
                                N_bins_window = 10,
                                calculation_window =  prange_zoom,
                                CL = "23_MK01_C5",
                                EXP = all_exp)
  
expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_MK01_C5 = left_join(expr_score_sum_tib_23_MK01_C5,  expr_score_real_23_MK01_C5) %>%
  mutate(expr_score_window_median_sel = case_when(
    total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_median,
    .default = NA),
    expr_score_window_lower_sel = case_when(
      total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_lower,
      .default = NA),
    expr_score_window_upper_sel = case_when(
      total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_upper,
      .default = NA))
```
### Figure S2A
```{r}
pExpr_23_MK01_C5 =
ggplot(expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_MK01_C5, aes(x = mid_interval)) +
  # annotate enhancer
  list(
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(enhancer), xmax = end(enhancer), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = brown),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(enhancer), end(enhancer)), col = brown),
    # annotate gene
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(Sox2_gene), xmax = end(Sox2_gene), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,alpha = .2, fill = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(Sox2_gene), end(Sox2_gene)), col = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_23), col = 'darkgrey'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra), col = 'darkgrey',linetype = 'dotted')
  ) +

  ## plot the confidence interval based on the resampled data
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = expr_score_window_lower_sel, ymax = expr_score_window_upper_sel), alpha = 0.2, fill = "#1b9e77") +
  #geom_line( aes(y = expr_score_window_mean), col = 'orange') +
  ## plot the median based on the resampled data
  geom_line(aes(y = expr_score_window_median_sel), col = "#1b9e77") +

  #axes
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6), labels = scales::unit_format(scale = 1E-6, accuracy = 0.01, unit=NULL),
                     limits=prange_zoom_paper, expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n=6),
                     limits = c(0, 25500)) +
  labs(x='Genomic coordinate (Mb)',y='expression score') +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = 'none')
  

pExpr_23_MK01_C5
```

## 3xCBS_Rv_Sox2P
```{r}
#all combined, 5kb window
set.seed(20240331)
min_ints_window = 3
N_bootstrap = 1000
BinSize = 1000
all_exp = unique(tib_filtered_curated_strict$experiment)

tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb = tib_filtered_FACS_vals %>% left_join(sorting_stats_tib_repcor)


# calculate running mean on random sample of same size, 500 times
# expr_score_tib_23_MK02_C2 = create_bootstrap_tibble(FUN = function(TIB){expr_score_function_new_weigh(TIB,
#                                                                                               binsize = BinSize,
#                                                                                               N_bins_window = 10,
#                                                                                               calculation_window =  prange_zoom,
#                                                                                               CL = "23_MK02_C2", EXP = all_exp)},
#                                             TIB = tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb,
# 
#                                                                                      N_resamples = N_bootstrap)
# saveRDS(expr_score_tib_23_MK02_C2, "/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/analysis/expression_score_new/ME20250708_new_expression_score_23_MK02_C2.rds")
expr_score_tib_23_MK02_C2 = readRDS("/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/analysis/expression_score_new/ME20250708_new_expression_score_23_MK02_C2.rds")



expr_score_sum_tib_23_MK02_C2 = bootstrap_summary_fun(expr_score_tib_23_MK02_C2,
                                           score_column = "expr_score_window",
                                           conf_int = 0.95)

#calculate actual expr score (for filtering # of ints per window)
expr_score_real_23_MK02_C2 =
  expr_score_function_new_weigh(tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb,
                                binsize = BinSize,
                                N_bins_window = 10,
                                calculation_window =  prange_zoom,
                                CL = "23_MK02_C2",
                                EXP = all_exp)
  
expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_MK02_C2 = left_join(expr_score_sum_tib_23_MK02_C2,  expr_score_real_23_MK02_C2) %>%
  mutate(expr_score_window_median_sel = case_when(
    total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_median,
    .default = NA),
    expr_score_window_lower_sel = case_when(
      total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_lower,
      .default = NA),
    expr_score_window_upper_sel = case_when(
      total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_upper,
      .default = NA))
```
### Figure S2A
```{r}
pExpr_23_MK02_C2 =
ggplot(expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_MK02_C2, aes(x = mid_interval)) +
  # annotate enhancer
  list(
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(enhancer), xmax = end(enhancer), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = brown),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(enhancer), end(enhancer)), col = brown),
    # annotate gene
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(Sox2_gene), xmax = end(Sox2_gene), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,alpha = .2, fill = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(Sox2_gene), end(Sox2_gene)), col = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_23), col = 'darkgrey'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra), col = 'darkgrey',linetype = 'dotted')
  ) +

  ## plot the confidence interval based on the resampled data
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = expr_score_window_lower_sel, ymax = expr_score_window_upper_sel), alpha = 0.2, fill = "#d95f02") +
  #geom_line( aes(y = expr_score_window_mean), col = 'orange') +
  ## plot the median based on the resampled data
  geom_line(aes(y = expr_score_window_median_sel), col = "#d95f02") +

  #axes
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6), labels = scales::unit_format(scale = 1E-6, accuracy = 0.01, unit=NULL),
                     limits=prange_zoom_paper, expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n=6),
                     limits = c(0, 25500)) +
  labs(x='Genomic coordinate (Mb)',y='expression score') +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = 'none')

pExpr_23_MK02_C2
```

## 1xCBS_Fw_Sox2P
```{r}
#all combined, 5kb window
set.seed(20240331)
min_ints_window = 3
N_bootstrap = 1000
BinSize = 1000
all_exp = unique(tib_filtered_curated_strict$experiment)

tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb = tib_filtered_FACS_vals %>% left_join(sorting_stats_tib_repcor)


# calculate running mean on random sample of same size, 500 times
# expr_score_tib_23_MK03_C1 = create_bootstrap_tibble(FUN = function(TIB){expr_score_function_new_weigh(TIB,
#                                                                                                       binsize = BinSize,
#                                                                                                       N_bins_window = 10,
#                                                                                                       calculation_window =  prange_zoom,
#                                                                                                       CL = "23_MK03_C1", EXP = all_exp)},
#                                                     TIB = tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb,
#                                                     N_resamples = N_bootstrap)
# 
# saveRDS(expr_score_tib_23_MK03_C1, "/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/analysis/expression_score_new/ME20250708_new_expression_score_23_MK03_C1.rds")
expr_score_tib_23_MK03_C1 = readRDS("/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/analysis/expression_score_new/ME20250708_new_expression_score_23_MK03_C1.rds")



expr_score_sum_tib_23_MK03_C1 = bootstrap_summary_fun(expr_score_tib_23_MK03_C1,
                                           score_column = "expr_score_window",
                                           conf_int = 0.95)

#calculate actual expr score (for filtering # of ints per window)
expr_score_real_23_MK03_C1 =
  expr_score_function_new_weigh(tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb,
                                binsize = BinSize,
                                N_bins_window = 10,
                                calculation_window =  prange_zoom,
                                CL = "23_MK03_C1",
                                EXP = all_exp)
  
expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_MK03_C1 = left_join(expr_score_sum_tib_23_MK03_C1,  expr_score_real_23_MK03_C1) %>%
  mutate(expr_score_window_median_sel = case_when(
    total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_median,
    .default = NA),
    expr_score_window_lower_sel = case_when(
      total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_lower,
      .default = NA),
    expr_score_window_upper_sel = case_when(
      total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_upper,
      .default = NA))
```
### Figure S2A
```{r}
pExpr_23_MK03_C1 =
ggplot(expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_MK03_C1, aes(x = mid_interval)) +
  # annotate enhancer
  list(
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(enhancer), xmax = end(enhancer), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = brown),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(enhancer), end(enhancer)), col = brown),
    # annotate gene
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(Sox2_gene), xmax = end(Sox2_gene), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,alpha = .2, fill = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(Sox2_gene), end(Sox2_gene)), col = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_23), col = 'darkgrey'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra), col = 'darkgrey',linetype = 'dotted')
  ) +

  ## plot the confidence interval based on the resampled data
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = expr_score_window_lower_sel, ymax = expr_score_window_upper_sel), alpha = 0.2, fill = "#7570b3") +
  #geom_line( aes(y = expr_score_window_mean), col = 'orange') +
  ## plot the median based on the resampled data
  geom_line(aes(y = expr_score_window_median_sel), col = "#7570b3") +

  #axes
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6), labels = scales::unit_format(scale = 1E-6, accuracy = 0.01, unit=NULL),
                     limits=prange_zoom_paper, expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n=6),
                     limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(x='Genomic coordinate (Mb)',y='expression score') +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = 'none')

pExpr_23_MK03_C1
```
### Plot together S2A
```{r}
plot_grid(pExpr_23_34A, pExpr_23_MK03_C1, pExpr_23_MK01_C5, pExpr_23_MK02_C2, ncol = 2, axis = "lb", align = "vh")
```

#Stranded - Expression score
## Sox2P
```{r}
#all combined, 5kb window
set.seed(20240331)
min_ints_window = 3
N_bootstrap = 1000
BinSize = 2000
all_exp = unique(tib_filtered_FACS_vals$experiment)


# calculate running mean on random sample of same size, 1000 times
# expr_score_tib_23_34A_str = create_bootstrap_tibble(FUN = function(TIB){expr_score_function_new_weigh_stranded(TIB,
#                                                                                               binsize = BinSize,
#                                                                                               N_bins_window = 10,
#                                                                                               calculation_window =  prange_zoom,
#                                                                                               CL = "23_34A", EXP = all_exp)},
#                                             TIB = tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb,
#                                             N_resamples = N_bootstrap)

# saveRDS(expr_score_tib_23_34A_str, "/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/analysis/expression_score_new/ME20250708_new_expression_score_23_34A_str.rds")
expr_score_tib_23_34A_str = readRDS("/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/analysis/expression_score_new/ME20250708_new_expression_score_23_34A_str.rds")



expr_score_sum_tib_23_34A_str = bootstrap_summary_fun_str(expr_score_tib_23_34A_str,
                                           score_column = "expr_score_window",
                                           conf_int = 0.95)

#calculate actual expr score (for filtering # of ints per window)
expr_score_real_23_34A_str =
  expr_score_function_new_weigh_stranded(tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb,
                                binsize = BinSize,
                                N_bins_window = 10,
                                calculation_window =  prange_zoom,
                                CL = "23_34A",
                                EXP = all_exp)
  
expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_34A_str = left_join(expr_score_sum_tib_23_34A_str,  expr_score_real_23_34A_str) %>%
  mutate(expr_score_window_median_sel = case_when(
    total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_median,
    .default = NA),
    expr_score_window_lower_sel = case_when(
      total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_lower,
      .default = NA),
    expr_score_window_upper_sel = case_when(
      total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_upper,
      .default = NA))
```

```{r}
pExpr_23_34A_str = 
ggplot(expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_34A_str, aes(x = mid_interval, col = strand, fill = strand, linetype = strand)) +
  # annotate enhancer
  list(
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(enhancer), xmax = end(enhancer), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = brown),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(enhancer), end(enhancer)), col = brown),
    # annotate gene
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(Sox2_gene), xmax = end(Sox2_gene), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,alpha = .2, fill = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(Sox2_gene), end(Sox2_gene)), col = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_23), col = 'darkgrey'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra), col = 'darkgrey',linetype = 'dotted')
  ) +

  ## plot the confidence interval based on the resampled data
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = expr_score_window_lower_sel, ymax = expr_score_window_upper_sel), alpha = 0.2) +
  #geom_line( aes(y = expr_score_window_mean), col = "orange") +
  ## plot the median based on the resampled data
  geom_line(aes(y = expr_score_window_median_sel)) +
 
  #axes
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6), labels = scales::unit_format(scale = 1E-6, accuracy = 0.01, unit=NULL),
                     limits=prange_zoom_paper, expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n=6),
                     limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(x='Genomic coordinate (Mb)',y='expression score') +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = 'bottom')

pExpr_23_34A_str


## split by strand
pExpr_23_34A_str_facet = 
ggplot(expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_34A_str, aes(x = mid_interval)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ strand) +
  # annotate enhancer
  list(
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(enhancer), xmax = end(enhancer), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = brown),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(enhancer), end(enhancer)), col = brown),
    # annotate gene
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(Sox2_gene), xmax = end(Sox2_gene), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,alpha = .2, fill = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(Sox2_gene), end(Sox2_gene)), col = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_23), col = 'darkgrey'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra), col = 'darkgrey',linetype = 'dotted')
  ) +

  ## plot the confidence interval based on the resampled data
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = expr_score_window_lower_sel, ymax = expr_score_window_upper_sel), alpha = 0.2, fill = "#080E5B") +
  geom_line( aes(y = expr_score_window_mean), col = "orange") +
  ## plot the median based on the resampled data
  geom_line(aes(y = expr_score_window_median_sel), col = "#080E5B") +
 
  #axes
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6), labels = scales::unit_format(scale = 1E-6, accuracy = 0.01, unit=NULL),
                     limits=prange_zoom_paper, expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n=6),
                     limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(x='Genomic coordinate (Mb)',y='expression score') +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = 'bottom')

pExpr_23_34A_str_facet
```

## 3xCBS_Fw_Sox2P
```{r}
#all combined, 5kb window
set.seed(20240331)
min_ints_window = 3
N_bootstrap = 1000
BinSize = 2000
all_exp = unique(tib_filtered_curated_strict$experiment)

tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb = tib_filtered_FACS_vals %>% left_join(sorting_stats_tib_repcor)


# calculate running mean on random sample of same size, 500 times
# expr_score_tib_23_MK01_C5_str = create_bootstrap_tibble(FUN = function(TIB){expr_score_function_new_weigh_stranded(TIB,
#                                                                                               binsize = BinSize,
#                                                                                               N_bins_window = 10,
#                                                                                               calculation_window =  prange_zoom,
#                                                                                               CL = "23_MK01_C5",
#                                                                                               EXP = all_exp)},
#                                             TIB = tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb,
#                                             N_resamples = N_bootstrap)

#saveRDS(expr_score_tib_23_MK01_C5_str, "/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/analysis/expression_score_new/ME20250708_new_expression_score_23_MK01_C5_str.rds")
expr_score_tib_23_MK01_C5_str = readRDS("/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/analysis/expression_score_new/ME20250708_new_expression_score_23_MK01_C5_str.rds")

expr_score_sum_tib_23_MK01_C5 = bootstrap_summary_fun_str(expr_score_tib_23_MK01_C5_str,
                                           score_column = "expr_score_window",
                                           conf_int = 0.95)

#calculate actual expr score (for filtering # of ints per window)
expr_score_real_23_MK01_C5 =
  expr_score_function_new_weigh_stranded(tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb,
                                binsize = BinSize,
                                N_bins_window = 10,
                                calculation_window =  prange_zoom,
                                CL = "23_MK01_C5",
                                EXP = all_exp)
  
expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_MK01_C5_str = left_join(expr_score_sum_tib_23_MK01_C5,  expr_score_real_23_MK01_C5) %>%
  mutate(expr_score_window_median_sel = case_when(
    total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_median,
    .default = NA),
    expr_score_window_lower_sel = case_when(
      total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_lower,
      .default = NA),
    expr_score_window_upper_sel = case_when(
      total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_upper,
      .default = NA))
```

```{r}
pExpr_23_MK01_C5_str =
ggplot(expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_MK01_C5_str, aes(x = mid_interval, col = strand, fill = strand, linetype = strand)) +
  # annotate enhancer
  list(
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(enhancer), xmax = end(enhancer), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = brown),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(enhancer), end(enhancer)), col = brown),
    # annotate gene
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(Sox2_gene), xmax = end(Sox2_gene), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,alpha = .2, fill = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(Sox2_gene), end(Sox2_gene)), col = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_23), col = 'darkgrey'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_8), col = 'darkgrey'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra), col = 'darkgrey',linetype = 'dotted')
  ) +

  ## plot the confidence interval based on the resampled data
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = expr_score_window_lower_sel, ymax = expr_score_window_upper_sel), alpha = 0.2) +
  #geom_line( aes(y = expr_score_window_mean), col = 'orange') +
  ## plot the median based on the resampled data
  geom_line(aes(y = expr_score_window_median_sel)) +

  #axes
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6), labels = scales::unit_format(scale = 1E-6, accuracy = 0.01, unit=NULL),
                     limits=prange_zoom_paper, expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n=6),
                     limits = c(0, 25500)) +
  labs(x='Genomic coordinate (Mb)',y='expression score') +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = 'bottom') +
  theme(axis.title.y=element_blank())

pExpr_23_MK01_C5_str
```

## 3xCBS_Rv_Sox2P
```{r}
#all combined, 5kb window
set.seed(20240331)
min_ints_window = 2
N_bootstrap = 1000
BinSize = 2000
all_exp = unique(tib_filtered_curated_strict$experiment)

tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb = tib_filtered_FACS_vals %>% left_join(sorting_stats_tib_repcor)


#calculate running mean on random sample of same size, 500 times
# expr_score_tib_23_MK02_C2_str = create_bootstrap_tibble(FUN = function(TIB){expr_score_function_new_weigh_stranded(TIB,
#                                                                                               binsize = BinSize,
#                                                                                               N_bins_window = 10,
#                                                                                               calculation_window =  prange_zoom,
#                                                                                               CL = "23_MK02_C2", EXP = all_exp)},
#                                             TIB = tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb,
# 
#                                                                                      N_resamples = N_bootstrap)
# saveRDS(expr_score_tib_23_MK02_C2_str, "/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/analysis/expression_score_new/ME20250708_new_expression_score_23_MK02_C2_str.rds")
expr_score_tib_23_MK02_C2_str = readRDS("/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/analysis/expression_score_new/ME20250708_new_expression_score_23_MK02_C2_str.rds")



expr_score_sum_tib_23_MK02_C2 = bootstrap_summary_fun_str(expr_score_tib_23_MK02_C2_str,
                                           score_column = "expr_score_window",
                                           conf_int = 0.95)

#calculate actual expr score (for filtering # of ints per window)
expr_score_real_23_MK02_C2_str =
  expr_score_function_new_weigh_stranded(tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb,
                                binsize = BinSize,
                                N_bins_window = 10,
                                calculation_window =  prange_zoom,
                                CL = "23_MK02_C2",
                                EXP = all_exp)
  
expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_MK02_C2_str = left_join(expr_score_sum_tib_23_MK02_C2,  expr_score_real_23_MK02_C2_str) %>%
  mutate(expr_score_window_median_sel = case_when(
    total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_median,
    .default = NA),
    expr_score_window_lower_sel = case_when(
      total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_lower,
      .default = NA),
    expr_score_window_upper_sel = case_when(
      total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_upper,
      .default = NA))
```

```{r}
pExpr_23_MK02_C2_str =
ggplot(expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_MK02_C2_str, aes(x = mid_interval, col = strand, fill = strand, linetype = strand)) +
  # annotate enhancer
  list(
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(enhancer), xmax = end(enhancer), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = brown),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(enhancer), end(enhancer)), col = brown),
    # annotate gene
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(Sox2_gene), xmax = end(Sox2_gene), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,alpha = .2, fill = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(Sox2_gene), end(Sox2_gene)), col = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_23), col = 'darkgrey'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra), col = 'darkgrey',linetype = 'dotted')
  ) +

  ## plot the confidence interval based on the resampled data
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = expr_score_window_lower_sel, ymax = expr_score_window_upper_sel), alpha = 0.2) +
  #geom_line( aes(y = expr_score_window_mean), col = 'orange') +
  ## plot the median based on the resampled data
  geom_line(aes(y = expr_score_window_median_sel)) +

  #axes
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6), labels = scales::unit_format(scale = 1E-6, accuracy = 0.01, unit=NULL),
                     limits=prange_zoom_paper, expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n=6),
                     limits = c(0, 25500)) +
  labs(x='Genomic coordinate (Mb)',y='expression score') +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = 'bottom') +
  theme(axis.title.y=element_blank())

pExpr_23_MK02_C2_str
```

## 1xCBS_Fw_Sox2P
```{r}
#all combined, 5kb window
set.seed(20240331)
min_ints_window = 3
N_bootstrap = 1000
BinSize = 2000
all_exp = unique(tib_filtered_curated_strict$experiment)

tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb = tib_filtered_FACS_vals %>% left_join(sorting_stats_tib_repcor)


# calculate running mean on random sample of same size, 500 times
# expr_score_tib_23_MK03_C1 = create_bootstrap_tibble(FUN = function(TIB){expr_score_function_new_weigh_stranded(TIB,
#                                                                                               binsize = BinSize,
#                                                                                               N_bins_window = 10,
#                                                                                               calculation_window =  prange_zoom,
#                                                                                               CL = "23_MK03_C1", EXP = all_exp)},
#                                             TIB = tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb,
# 
#                                                                                      N_resamples = N_bootstrap)

# saveRDS(expr_score_tib_23_MK03_C1, "/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/analysis/expression_score_new/ME20250708_new_expression_score_23_MK03_C1_stranded.rds")
expr_score_tib_23_MK03_C1 = readRDS("/DATA/projects/CTCF_Sox2/analysis/expression_score_new/ME20250708_new_expression_score_23_MK03_C1_stranded.rds")



expr_score_sum_tib_23_MK03_C1 = bootstrap_summary_fun_str(expr_score_tib_23_MK03_C1,
                                           score_column = "expr_score_window",
                                           conf_int = 0.95)

#calculate actual expr score (for filtering # of ints per window)
expr_score_real_23_MK03_C1_str =
  expr_score_function_new_weigh_stranded(tib_filtered_FACS_vals_comb,
                                binsize = BinSize,
                                N_bins_window = 10,
                                calculation_window =  prange_zoom,
                                CL = "23_MK03_C1",
                                EXP = all_exp)
  
expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_MK03_C1_str = left_join(expr_score_sum_tib_23_MK03_C1,  expr_score_real_23_MK03_C1_str) %>%
  mutate(expr_score_window_median_sel = case_when(
    total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_median,
    .default = NA),
    expr_score_window_lower_sel = case_when(
      total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_lower,
      .default = NA),
    expr_score_window_upper_sel = case_when(
      total_ints_window >= min_ints_window ~ expr_score_window_upper,
      .default = NA))
```

```{r}
pExpr_23_MK03_C1_str =
ggplot(expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_MK03_C1_str, aes(x = mid_interval,  col = strand, fill = strand, linetype = strand)) +
  # annotate enhancer
  list(
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(enhancer), xmax = end(enhancer), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = brown),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(enhancer), end(enhancer)), col = brown),
    # annotate gene
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(Sox2_gene), xmax = end(Sox2_gene), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,alpha = .2, fill = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(Sox2_gene), end(Sox2_gene)), col = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_23), col = 'darkgrey'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra), col = 'darkgrey',linetype = 'dotted')
  ) +

  ## plot the confidence interval based on the resampled data
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = expr_score_window_lower_sel, ymax = expr_score_window_upper_sel), alpha = 0.2) +
  #geom_line( aes(y = expr_score_window_mean), col = 'orange') +
  ## plot the median based on the resampled data
  geom_line(aes(y = expr_score_window_median_sel)) +

  #axes
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6), labels = scales::unit_format(scale = 1E-6, accuracy = 0.01, unit=NULL),
                     limits=prange_zoom_paper, expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n=6),
                     limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(x='Genomic coordinate (Mb)',y='expression score') +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = 'bottom') +
  theme(axis.title.y=element_blank())

pExpr_23_MK03_C1_str
```

## plot together
```{r Figure S2F, S2G, S2H, S2I}
expr_score_sum_per_cl_str = bind_rows(`23_34A` = expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_34A_str, 
                                  `23_MK01_C5` = expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_MK01_C5_str, 
                                  `23_MK02_C2` = expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_MK02_C2_str,
                                  `23_MK03_C1` = expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_MK03_C1_str,
                                  .id = 'cell_line') %>%
  mutate(cell_line = factor(cell_line, levels = c("23_34A", "23_MK01_C5", "23_MK02_C2", "23_MK03_C1")))

 
# Figure S2F, S2G, S2H, S2I expression scores per strand
expr_score_sum_per_cl_str %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = mid_interval)) +
  facet_grid(.~ factor(cell_line, levels = c("23_34A", "23_MK01_C5", "23_MK02_C2", "23_MK03_C1"))) +
  # annotate enhancer
  list(
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(enhancer), xmax = end(enhancer), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = brown),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(enhancer), end(enhancer)), col = brown),
    # annotate gene
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(Sox2_gene), xmax = end(Sox2_gene), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,alpha = .2, fill = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(Sox2_gene), end(Sox2_gene)), col = 'red'),
    #geom_vline(data = LP_tib_for_plot, aes(xintercept = start), col = 'darkgrey'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra), col = 'darkgrey',linetype = 'dotted')
  ) +
  
  ## plot the confidence interval based on the resampled data
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = expr_score_window_lower_sel, ymax = expr_score_window_upper_sel, fill = strand), alpha = 0.2) +
  # geom_line( aes(y = expr_score_window_mean), col = 'orange') +
  ## plot the median based on the resampled data
  geom_line(aes(y = expr_score_window_median_sel, col = strand), linewidth = 0.6) +
  #axes
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6), labels = scales::unit_format(scale = 1E-6, accuracy = 0.01, unit=NULL),
                     limits=prange_zoom_paper, expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n=6),
                     limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(x='Genomic coordinate (Mb)',y='expression score') +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = 'bottom')


# Figure S2F, S2G, S2H, S2I expression scores per strand
expr_score_sum_per_cl_str %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = mid_interval)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ strand) +
  # annotate enhancer
  list(
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(enhancer), xmax = end(enhancer), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = brown),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(enhancer), end(enhancer)), col = brown),
    # annotate gene
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(Sox2_gene), xmax = end(Sox2_gene), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,alpha = .2, fill = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(Sox2_gene), end(Sox2_gene)), col = 'red'),
    # annotate LP's
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_23), col = 'darkgrey'),
    #geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_8), col = 'darkgrey'),
    #geom_vline(data = LP_tib_for_plot, aes(xintercept = start), col = 'darkgrey'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra), col = 'darkgrey',linetype = 'dotted')
  ) +
  ## plot the confidence interval based on the resampled data
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = expr_score_window_lower_sel, ymax = expr_score_window_upper_sel, fill = cell_line), alpha = 0.2) +
  #geom_line( aes(y = expr_score_window_mean), col = 'orange') +
  ## plot the median based on the resampled data
  geom_line(aes(y = expr_score_window_median_sel, col = cell_line), linewidth = 0.6) +
  #axes
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6), labels = scales::unit_format(scale = 1E-6, accuracy = 0.01, unit=NULL),
                     limits=prange_zoom_paper, expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n=6),
                     limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(x='Genomic coordinate (Mb)',y='expression score') +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = 'bottom') +
  col_scale_MK_CL
```


```{r Figure 2F}
expr_score_sum_per_cl_str %>%
  filter(cell_line %in% c("23_34A", "23_MK03_C1")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = mid_interval)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ strand) +
  # annotate enhancer
  list(
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(enhancer), xmax = end(enhancer), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = brown),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(enhancer), end(enhancer)), col = brown),
    # annotate gene
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(Sox2_gene), xmax = end(Sox2_gene), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,alpha = .2, fill = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(Sox2_gene), end(Sox2_gene)), col = 'red'),
    # annotate LP's
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_23), col = 'darkgrey'),
    #geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_8), col = 'darkgrey'),
    #geom_vline(data = LP_tib_for_plot, aes(xintercept = start), col = 'darkgrey'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra), col = 'darkgrey',linetype = 'dotted')
  ) +
  ## plot the confidence interval based on the resampled data
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = expr_score_window_lower_sel, ymax = expr_score_window_upper_sel, fill = cell_line), alpha = 0.2) +
  #geom_line( aes(y = expr_score_window_mean), col = 'orange') +
  ## plot the median based on the resampled data
  geom_line(aes(y = expr_score_window_median_sel, col = cell_line), linewidth = 0.6) +
  #axes
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6), labels = scales::unit_format(scale = 1E-6, accuracy = 0.01, unit=NULL),
                     limits=prange_zoom_paper, expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n=6),
                     limits = c(0, 26e3)) +
  labs(x='Genomic coordinate (Mb)',y='expression score') +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = 'bottom') +
  col_scale_MK_CL
```


```{r Figure 2G}
expr_score_sum_per_cl_str %>%
  filter(cell_line %in% c("23_34A", "23_MK01_C5")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = mid_interval)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ strand) +
  # annotate enhancer
  list(
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(enhancer), xmax = end(enhancer), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = brown),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(enhancer), end(enhancer)), col = brown),
    # annotate gene
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(Sox2_gene), xmax = end(Sox2_gene), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,alpha = .2, fill = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(Sox2_gene), end(Sox2_gene)), col = 'red'),
    # annotate LP's
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_23), col = 'darkgrey'),
    #geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_8), col = 'darkgrey'),
    #geom_vline(data = LP_tib_for_plot, aes(xintercept = start), col = 'darkgrey'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra), col = 'darkgrey',linetype = 'dotted')
  ) +
  ## plot the confidence interval based on the resampled data
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = expr_score_window_lower_sel, ymax = expr_score_window_upper_sel, fill = cell_line), alpha = 0.2) +
  #geom_line( aes(y = expr_score_window_mean), col = 'orange') +
  ## plot the median based on the resampled data
  geom_line(aes(y = expr_score_window_median_sel, col = cell_line), linewidth = 0.6) +
  #axes
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6), labels = scales::unit_format(scale = 1E-6, accuracy = 0.01, unit=NULL),
                     limits=prange_zoom_paper, expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n=6),
                     limits = c(0, 26e3)) +
  labs(x='Genomic coordinate (Mb)',y='expression score') +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = 'bottom') +
  col_scale_MK_CL
```

```{r Figure 2H}
expr_score_sum_per_cl_str %>%
  filter(cell_line %in% c("23_34A", "23_MK02_C2")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = mid_interval)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ strand) +
  # annotate enhancer
  list(
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(enhancer), xmax = end(enhancer), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = brown),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(enhancer), end(enhancer)), col = brown),
    # annotate gene
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(Sox2_gene), xmax = end(Sox2_gene), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,alpha = .2, fill = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(Sox2_gene), end(Sox2_gene)), col = 'red'),
    # annotate LP's
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_23), col = 'darkgrey'),
    #geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_8), col = 'darkgrey'),
    #geom_vline(data = LP_tib_for_plot, aes(xintercept = start), col = 'darkgrey'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra), col = 'darkgrey',linetype = 'dotted')
  ) +
  ## plot the confidence interval based on the resampled data
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = expr_score_window_lower_sel, ymax = expr_score_window_upper_sel, fill = cell_line), alpha = 0.2) +
  #geom_line( aes(y = expr_score_window_mean), col = 'orange') +
  ## plot the median based on the resampled data
  geom_line(aes(y = expr_score_window_median_sel, col = cell_line), linewidth = 0.6) +
  #axes
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6), labels = scales::unit_format(scale = 1E-6, accuracy = 0.01, unit=NULL),
                     limits=prange_zoom_paper, expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n=6),
                     limits = c(0, 26e3)) +
  labs(x='Genomic coordinate (Mb)',y='expression score') +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = 'bottom') +
  col_scale_MK_CL
```

# Hopping bias due to CBS inserts
- CBS inserts causes different hopping distributions
- use control sorted integrations for LP-116 kb 

## reorder cell lines for plotting
```{r}
# add factor and levels for ordering
tib_filtered_curated_strict = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
  mutate(cell_line = factor(cell_line, levels = c("23_34A", "23_MK03_C1", "23_MK01_C5", "23_MK02_C2")))
```

## LP-116kb 
```{r}
# count 1MB to the right and left of the LP, calculate fraction over total for each
tib_ctrl_fract_tot = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% filter(population == "ctrl" & launch_pad_location == "-116 kb" & chr == "chr3" & hopped & start >= (start(landingPad_23)-1e6) & start <= start(landingPad_23)+1e6) %>%
  group_by(cell_line) %>% summarise(total_n = n())
  
# coordinate of the launch pad (numeric)
lp_coord <- start(landingPad_23)

# count upstream and downstream separately
tib_ctrl_fract_split <- tib_filtered_curated_strict %>%
  filter(population == "ctrl",
         launch_pad_location == "-116 kb",
         chr == "chr3",
         hopped,
         start >= (lp_coord - 1e6),
         start <= (lp_coord + 1e6)) %>%
  mutate(region = case_when(
    start < lp_coord ~ "upstream",
    start > lp_coord ~ "downstream",
    TRUE ~ "at_LP"
  )) %>%
  group_by(cell_line, region) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  # join with total counts
  left_join(tib_ctrl_fract_tot, by = "cell_line") %>%
  mutate(frac = n / total_n)

tib_ctrl_fract_split
```

### Function to calculate p-value fisher test
```{r}
# Make a helper function: build a 2x2 table and run Fisher’s test
compare_to_control <- function(df, test_line, control_line = "23_34A") {
  sub <- df %>%
    filter(cell_line %in% c(control_line, test_line)) %>%
    select(cell_line, region, n) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = region, values_from = n)
  
  mat <- as.matrix(sub[, c("upstream", "downstream")])
  rownames(mat) <- sub$cell_line
  
  res <- fisher.test(mat)
  tibble(test_line = test_line,
         p_value = res$p.value,
         odds_ratio = res$estimate)
}

# Run for each MK line
results <- map_dfr(c("23_MK01_C5", "23_MK02_C2", "23_MK03_C1"),
                   ~compare_to_control(tib_ctrl_fract_split, .x))

results
```
**Conclusion:**
MK01: odds ratio 2.73 → significantly more downstream integrations than control (p ≈ 1.8e-9).
MK02: odds ratio 0.38 → significantly more upstream integrations than control (p ≈ 1.8e-17).
MK03: odds ratio 2.0 → significantly more downstream integrations than control (p ≈ 9.9e-10).
So compared to 23_34A, the MK lines show skewed distributions, but in opposite directions for MK02

### Plot results - Figure 6D
```{r figure 6D}
ggplot(tib_ctrl_fract_split,
       aes(x = cell_line, y = frac, fill = region)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("upstream" = "skyblue", "downstream" = "orange")) +
  ylab("Fraction of integrations") +
  xlab("Cell line") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r figure 6D with pvalues}
# Prep results for plotting (add significance stars)
results <- results %>%
  mutate(sig = case_when(
    p_value < 1e-10 ~ "***",
    p_value < 1e-5  ~ "**",
    p_value < 0.01  ~ "*",
    TRUE            ~ "ns"
  ))

# Fraction barplot
p <- ggplot(tib_ctrl_fract_split,
            aes(x = cell_line, y = frac, fill = region)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("upstream" = "skyblue", "downstream" = "orange")) +
  ylab("Fraction of integrations (±1 Mb)") +
  xlab("Cell line") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

# Add significance annotations comparing to 23_34A
p + geom_signif(
      comparisons = list(c("23_34A", "23_MK03_C1"),
                         c("23_34A", "23_MK01_C5"),
                         c("23_34A", "23_MK02_C2")),
      annotations = results$p_value ,
      y_position = c(1.05, 1.12, 1.19),  # adjust so stars are nicely spaced above bars
      tip_length = 0.01
    )
```

### Fraction of integrations in Sox2-SCR interval - Figure S5G
```{r Figure S5G}

tib_ctrl_fract_tot_LP116 = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% filter(population == "ctrl" & launch_pad_location == "-116 kb" & chr == "chr3" & hopped & start >= (start(landingPad_23)-1e6) & start <= start(landingPad_23)+1e6) %>%
  group_by(cell_line) %>% summarise(total_n = n())

tib_ctrl_fract_Sox2_SCR_LP116 = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
  filter(population == "ctrl" & launch_pad_location == "-116 kb" & chr == "chr3" & hopped & start >= (end(Sox2_gene)) & start <= start(enhancer)) %>%
  group_by(cell_line) %>% summarise(Sox2_SCR_n = n()) %>% left_join(tib_ctrl_fract_tot_LP116) %>%
  mutate(fract_interval = Sox2_SCR_n/total_n)

kable(tib_ctrl_fract_Sox2_SCR_LP116)
```

```{r Figure S5G plot}
# count 1MB to the left of Sox2 gene, than Sox2-SCR, 1Mb end of SCR, calculate fraction over total
tib_ctrl_fract_tot = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% filter(population == "ctrl" & launch_pad_location == "-116 kb" & chr == "chr3" & hopped & start >= (start(Sox2_gene)-1e6) & start <= end(enhancer)+1e6) %>%
  group_by(cell_line) %>% summarise(total_n = n())
  
# coordinate of the launch pad (numeric)
Sox2_coord <- start(Sox2_gene)
SCR_coord <- end(enhancer)

# count upstream and downstream separately
tib_ctrl_fract_split <- tib_filtered_curated_strict %>%
  filter(population == "ctrl",
         launch_pad_location == "-116 kb",
         chr == "chr3",
         hopped,
         start >= (Sox2_coord - 1e6),
         start <= (SCR_coord + 1e6)) %>%
  mutate(region = case_when(
    start < Sox2_coord ~ "upstream",
    start > end(Sox2_gene) & start < start(enhancer) ~ "Sox2_SCR",
    start > SCR_coord ~ "downstream",
    TRUE ~ "in_Sox2_or_SCR"
  )) %>%
  group_by(cell_line, region) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  # join with total counts
  left_join(tib_ctrl_fract_tot, by = "cell_line") %>%
  mutate(frac = n / total_n)

tib_ctrl_fract_split %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = cell_line, y = frac, fill = region)) +
  geom_bar(stat= "identity") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
```
