```{r Figure S5G plot}
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("upstream" = "skyblue", "downstream" = "orange", "Sox2_SCR" = "purple", "in_Sox2_or_SCR" = "grey")) +
  ylab("Fraction of integrations") +
  xlab("Cell line") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

# add % to plot
tib_ctrl_fract_split %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = cell_line, y = frac, fill = region)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::percent(frac, accuracy = 1)),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            color = "black",
            size = 3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "upstream" = "skyblue",
    "downstream" = "orange",
    "Sox2_SCR" = "purple",
    "in_Sox2_or_SCR" = "grey"
  )) +
  ylab("Fraction of integrations (±1 Mb)") +
  xlab("Cell line") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  ggtitle("Fraction of integrations from LP-116 kb") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

```

## Plot beeswarms
### Sox2P - Figure S1B
```{r Figure S1B}
all_exp = unique(tib_filtered_curated_strict$experiment)

#Rep 1
p23_34A_bs_rep1 =
plot_beeswarm_only(TIB = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
                   filter(hopped & chr == "chr3" & replicate == "rep1" & population != "P0") %>% droplevels(),
                   EXP = all_exp,
                   CL = "23_34A",
                   PLOT_ANNOT = T,
                   PLOT_CTCF = F,
                   P_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper,
                   POINT_SIZE = 1.5)
p23_34A_bs_rep1

#Rep 2
p23_34A_bs_rep2 =
plot_beeswarm_only(TIB = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
                   filter(hopped & chr == "chr3" & replicate == "rep2" & population != "P0") %>% droplevels(),
                   EXP = all_exp,
                   CL = "23_34A",
                   PLOT_ANNOT = T,
                   PLOT_CTCF = F,
                   P_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper,
                   POINT_SIZE = 1.5)
p23_34A_bs_rep2

#Rep 3
p23_34A_bs_rep3 =
plot_beeswarm_only(TIB = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
                   filter(hopped & chr == "chr3" & replicate == "rep3" & population != "P0") %>% droplevels(),
                   EXP = all_exp,
                   CL = "23_34A",
                   PLOT_ANNOT = T,
                   PLOT_CTCF = F,
                   P_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper,
                   POINT_SIZE = 1.5)
p23_34A_bs_rep3

#Rep 4
p23_34A_bs_rep4 =
plot_beeswarm_only(TIB = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
                   filter(hopped & chr == "chr3" & replicate == "rep4" & population != "P0") %>% droplevels(),
                   EXP = all_exp,
                   CL = "23_34A",
                   PLOT_ANNOT = T,
                   PLOT_CTCF = F,
                   P_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper,
                   POINT_SIZE = 1.5)
p23_34A_bs_rep4

plot_grid(p23_34A_bs_rep1, p23_34A_bs_rep2, p23_34A_bs_rep3, p23_34A_bs_rep4, ncol = 2)
```

### 3xCBS_Sox2P_Fw
```{r}
all_exp = unique(tib_filtered_curated_strict$experiment)

#Rep 1
p23_MK01_bs_rep1 =
plot_beeswarm_only(TIB = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
                   filter(hopped & chr == "chr3" & replicate == "rep1" & population != "P0") %>% droplevels(),
                   EXP = all_exp,
                   CL = "23_MK01_C5",
                   PLOT_ANNOT = T,
                   PLOT_CTCF = F,
                   P_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper,
                   POINT_SIZE = 1.5)
p23_MK01_bs_rep1

#Rep 2
p23_MK01_bs_rep2 =
plot_beeswarm_only(TIB = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
                   filter(hopped & chr == "chr3" & replicate == "rep2" & population != "P0") %>% droplevels(),
                   EXP = all_exp,
                   CL = "23_MK01_C5",
                   PLOT_ANNOT = T,
                   PLOT_CTCF = F,
                   P_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper,
                   POINT_SIZE = 1.5)
p23_MK01_bs_rep2

plot_grid(p23_MK01_bs_rep1, p23_MK01_bs_rep2, ncol = 1)
```

### 3xCBS_Sox2P_Rv
```{r}
all_exp = unique(tib_filtered_curated_strict$experiment)

#Rep 1
p23_MK02_bs_rep1 =
plot_beeswarm_only(TIB = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
                   filter(hopped & chr == "chr3" & replicate == "rep1" & population != "P0") %>% droplevels(),
                   EXP = all_exp,
                   CL = "23_MK02_C2",
                   PLOT_ANNOT = T,
                   PLOT_CTCF = F,
                   P_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper,
                   POINT_SIZE = 1.5)
p23_MK02_bs_rep1

#Rep 2
p23_MK02_bs_rep2 =
plot_beeswarm_only(TIB = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
                   filter(hopped & chr == "chr3" & replicate == "rep2" & population != "P0") %>% droplevels(),
                   EXP = all_exp,
                   CL = "23_MK02_C2",
                   PLOT_ANNOT = T,
                   PLOT_CTCF = F,
                   P_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper,
                   POINT_SIZE = 1.5)
p23_MK02_bs_rep2

plot_grid(p23_MK02_bs_rep1, p23_MK02_bs_rep2, ncol = 1)
```

### 1xCBS_Sox2P_Fw
```{r}
all_exp = unique(tib_filtered_curated_strict$experiment)

#Rep 1
p23_MK03_bs_rep1 =
plot_beeswarm_only(TIB = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
                   filter(hopped & chr == "chr3" & replicate == "rep1" & population != "P0") %>% droplevels(),
                   EXP = all_exp,
                   CL = "23_MK03_C1",
                   PLOT_ANNOT = T,
                   PLOT_CTCF = F,
                   P_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper,
                   POINT_SIZE = 1.5)
p23_MK03_bs_rep1

#Rep 2
p23_MK03_bs_rep2 =
plot_beeswarm_only(TIB = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
                   filter(hopped & chr == "chr3" & replicate == "rep2" & population != "P0") %>% droplevels(),
                   EXP = all_exp,
                   CL = "23_MK03_C1",
                   PLOT_ANNOT = T,
                   PLOT_CTCF = F,
                   P_RANGE = prange_zoom_paper,
                   POINT_SIZE = 1.5)
p23_MK03_bs_rep2

plot_grid(p23_MK03_bs_rep1, p23_MK03_bs_rep2, ncol = 1)
```

## Correlation of replicates
### Sox2P - Figure S1C
```{r Correlation of replicates for 23_34A Figure S1C}
bin_borders = seq(from = prange_zoom_paper[1], to = prange_zoom_paper[2], by = 5000)
bin_borders_tib = tibble(start_window = bin_borders) %>%
  mutate(interval_number = row_number())

#count the number of integrations per cell line, population and bin
N_ints_pop_tib = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
  filter(cell_line == "23_34A" & hopped) %>%
  group_by(experiment, population) %>%
  summarize(N_ints_pop = n())

N_ints_bins_tmp = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
  filter(chr == "chr3" & cell_line == "23_34A" & hopped) %>%
  mutate(interval_number = findInterval(start, bin_borders)) %>%
  group_by(experiment, population, interval_number) %>%
  summarize(N_ints_bin = n()) %>%
  left_join(N_ints_pop_tib) %>%
  mutate(fract_ints_bin = N_ints_bin/N_ints_pop)

frac_ints_bins_wide = N_ints_bins_tmp %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = c(population, interval_number),
              names_from = experiment,
              values_from = fract_ints_bin,
              values_fill = 0)

frac_ints_bins_wide_full = 
  #make all combinations of interval_number and population
  expand_grid(interval_number = c(0, bin_borders_tib$interval_number),
              population = unique(N_ints_bins_tmp$population)) %>%
  #add the fractions and replace all NAs with zeros
  left_join(frac_ints_bins_wide) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace_na(.x, 0))) 

#plot pairs
filter(frac_ints_bins_wide_full, 
               population != 'ctrl' & 
               !interval_number %in% c(0, max(interval_number))) %>% #remove the outer bins, which are bigger than 5kb
  dplyr::rename(replicate_1 = E2138,
                replicate_2 = E2282,
                replicate_3 = E2285,
                replicate_4 = E2712) %>%
  mutate(replicate_4 = case_when(population %in% c("P1", "P2", "P6") ~ NA, #replicate 4 only contained P3-P5
                                 .default = replicate_4)) %>%
  ggpairs(aes(col = population),
        columns = paste0('replicate_',1:4),
        lower = list(continuous = "points", stroke = NA), #, mapping=aes(color=population
        upper = list(continuous = wrap("cor", method = "spearman"))) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) 
```

### 3xCBS_Fw_Sox2P - Figure S1E
```{r Correlation of replicates for 23_MK01_C5 Figure S1E}
bin_borders = seq(from = prange_zoom_paper[1], to = prange_zoom_paper[2], by = 5000)
bin_borders_tib = tibble(start_window = bin_borders) %>%
  mutate(interval_number = row_number())

#count the number of integrations per cell line, population and bin
N_ints_pop_tib = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
  filter(cell_line == "23_MK01_C5" & hopped) %>%
  group_by(experiment, population) %>%
  summarize(N_ints_pop = n())

N_ints_bins_tmp = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
  filter(chr == "chr3" & cell_line == "23_MK01_C5" & hopped) %>%
  mutate(interval_number = findInterval(start, bin_borders)) %>%
  group_by(experiment, population, interval_number) %>%
  summarize(N_ints_bin = n()) %>%
  left_join(N_ints_pop_tib) %>%
  mutate(fract_ints_bin = N_ints_bin/N_ints_pop)

frac_ints_bins_wide = N_ints_bins_tmp %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = c(population, interval_number),
              names_from = experiment,
              values_from = fract_ints_bin,
              values_fill = 0)

frac_ints_bins_wide_full = 
  #make all combinations of interval_number and population
  expand_grid(interval_number = c(0, bin_borders_tib$interval_number),
              population = unique(N_ints_bins_tmp$population)) %>%
  #add the fractions and replace all NAs with zeros
  left_join(frac_ints_bins_wide) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace_na(.x, 0))) 

#plot pairs
pMK01_rep_cor =
filter(frac_ints_bins_wide_full, 
               population != 'ctrl' & 
               !interval_number %in% c(0, max(interval_number))) %>% #remove the outer bins, which are bigger than 5kb
  dplyr::rename(replicate_1 = E2285,
                replicate_2 = E2401) %>%
  ggpairs(aes(col = population),
        columns = paste0('replicate_',1:2),
        lower = list(continuous = "points", stroke = NA), #, mapping=aes(color=population
        upper = list(continuous = wrap("cor", method = "spearman"))) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) 

pMK01_rep_cor
```

### 3xCBS_Rv_Sox2P - Figure S1E
```{r Correlation of replicates for 23_MK02_C2 - Figure S1E}
bin_borders = seq(from = prange_zoom_paper[1], to = prange_zoom_paper[2], by = 5000)
bin_borders_tib = tibble(start_window = bin_borders) %>%
  mutate(interval_number = row_number())

#count the number of integrations per cell line, population and bin
N_ints_pop_tib = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
  filter(cell_line == "23_MK02_C2" & hopped) %>%
  group_by(experiment, population) %>%
  summarize(N_ints_pop = n())

N_ints_bins_tmp = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
  filter(chr == "chr3" & cell_line == "23_MK02_C2" & hopped) %>%
  mutate(interval_number = findInterval(start, bin_borders)) %>%
  group_by(experiment, population, interval_number) %>%
  summarize(N_ints_bin = n()) %>%
  left_join(N_ints_pop_tib) %>%
  mutate(fract_ints_bin = N_ints_bin/N_ints_pop)

frac_ints_bins_wide = N_ints_bins_tmp %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = c(population, interval_number),
              names_from = experiment,
              values_from = fract_ints_bin,
              values_fill = 0)

frac_ints_bins_wide_full = 
  #make all combinations of interval_number and population
  expand_grid(interval_number = c(0, bin_borders_tib$interval_number),
              population = unique(N_ints_bins_tmp$population)) %>%
  #add the fractions and replace all NAs with zeros
  left_join(frac_ints_bins_wide) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace_na(.x, 0))) 

#plot pairs
pMK02_rep_cor =
filter(frac_ints_bins_wide_full, 
               population != 'ctrl' & 
               !interval_number %in% c(0, max(interval_number))) %>% #remove the outer bins, which are bigger than 5kb
  dplyr::rename(replicate_1 = E2285,
                replicate_2 = E2401) %>%
  ggpairs(aes(col = population),
        columns = paste0('replicate_',1:2),
        lower = list(continuous = "points", stroke = NA), #, mapping=aes(color=population
        upper = list(continuous = wrap("cor", method = "spearman"))) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) 

pMK02_rep_cor
```


### 1xCBS_Fw_Sox2P - Figure S1E
```{r Correlation of replicates for 23_MK03_C1 - Figure S1E}
bin_borders = seq(from = prange_zoom_paper[1], to = prange_zoom_paper[2], by = 5000)
bin_borders_tib = tibble(start_window = bin_borders) %>%
  mutate(interval_number = row_number())

#count the number of integrations per cell line, population and bin
N_ints_pop_tib = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
  filter(cell_line == "23_MK03_C1" & hopped) %>%
  group_by(experiment, population) %>%
  summarize(N_ints_pop = n())

N_ints_bins_tmp = tib_filtered_curated_strict %>% 
  filter(chr == "chr3" & cell_line == "23_MK03_C1" & hopped) %>%
  mutate(interval_number = findInterval(start, bin_borders)) %>%
  group_by(experiment, population, interval_number) %>%
  summarize(N_ints_bin = n()) %>%
  left_join(N_ints_pop_tib) %>%
  mutate(fract_ints_bin = N_ints_bin/N_ints_pop)

frac_ints_bins_wide = N_ints_bins_tmp %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = c(population, interval_number),
              names_from = experiment,
              values_from = fract_ints_bin,
              values_fill = 0)

frac_ints_bins_wide_full = 
  #make all combinations of interval_number and population
  expand_grid(interval_number = c(0, bin_borders_tib$interval_number),
              population = unique(N_ints_bins_tmp$population)) %>%
  #add the fractions and replace all NAs with zeros
  left_join(frac_ints_bins_wide) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace_na(.x, 0))) 

#plot pairs
pMK03_rep_cor =
filter(frac_ints_bins_wide_full, 
               population != 'ctrl' & 
               !interval_number %in% c(0, max(interval_number))) %>% #remove the outer bins, which are bigger than 5kb
  dplyr::rename(replicate_1 = E2285,
                replicate_2 = E2401) %>%
  ggpairs(aes(col = population),
        columns = paste0('replicate_',1:2),
        lower = list(continuous = "points", stroke = NA), #, mapping=aes(color=population
        upper = list(continuous = wrap("cor", method = "spearman"))) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) 

pMK03_rep_cor
```


# Annotate weak enhancer upstream of SCR
Load ChIP seq tracks of active marks (H3K27Ac, P300) and pluripotency TFs (SOX2, NANOG, OCT4) and plot together with expression score for each construct. 
## Load ChIP-seq datasets datasets
```{r load ChIP-seq datasets}
# ChIP-seq datasets used can be found in Table S6

paths_ext_data_files_figure = c(
  H3K27ac = '/DATA/usr/c.moene/public_data/ChIP/Histons/H3K27ac_ENCFF583WVZ_signal_pval.bigWig',
  P300_serum = '/DATA/shared/projects/TRIP/TRIP_TF_REPORTERS/annotation/cistrome_v2.0/mm10/bigWig/p300_2821_Creyghton.bw',
  CTCF = '/DATA/projects/Sox2/CTCF_ChIP_analysis/results/bigwig/6764_2_ME_E2_CGATGT_S2_R1_001.bw', #new, aligned to mm10 only
  SOX2 = '/DATA/shared/projects/TRIP/TRIP_TF_REPORTERS/annotation/cistrome_v2.0/mm10/bigWig/SOX2_73602_Chronis.bw',
  OCT4 = '/DATA/shared/projects/TRIP/TRIP_TF_REPORTERS/annotation/cistrome_v2.0/mm10/bigWig/OCT4_73603_Chronis.bw',
  NANOG = '/DATA/shared/projects/TRIP/TRIP_TF_REPORTERS/annotation/cistrome_v2.0/mm10/bigWig/NANOG_73565_Chronis.bw')


```
## Plot expression scores facet by strand 

```{r Stranded expression scores for all constructs}

# Sox2P - pME034
pExpr_23_34A_str = 
ggplot(expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_34A_str, aes(x = mid_interval)) +
  # annotate enhancer
  list(
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(enhancer), xmax = end(enhancer), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = brown),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(enhancer), end(enhancer)), col = brown),
    # annotate gene
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(Sox2_gene), xmax = end(Sox2_gene), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,alpha = .2, fill = 'red'),
    #geom_vline(xintercept = start(CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra), col = 'darkgrey',linetype = 'dotted'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(Sox2_gene), end(Sox2_gene)), col = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_23), col = 'darkgrey')
  ) +

  ## plot the confidence interval based on the resampled data
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = expr_score_window_lower_sel, ymax = expr_score_window_upper_sel, fill = strand), alpha = 0.2) +
  #geom_line( aes(y = expr_score_window_mean), col = "orange") +
  ## plot the median based on the resampled data
  geom_line(aes(y = expr_score_window_median_sel, col = strand)) +
 
  #axes
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), labels = scales::unit_format(scale = 1E-6, accuracy = 0.01, unit=NULL),
                     limits=prange_ChIP, expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n=6),
                     limits = c(0, 25500)) +
  labs(x='Genomic coordinate (Mb)',y='expression score') +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = 'top')

pExpr_23_34A_str


#3xCBS_Fw_Sox2P - MK01
pExpr_23_MK01_C5_str =
ggplot(expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_MK01_C5_str, aes(x = mid_interval)) +
  # annotate enhancer
  list(
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(enhancer), xmax = end(enhancer), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = brown),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(enhancer), end(enhancer)), col = brown),
    # annotate gene
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(Sox2_gene), xmax = end(Sox2_gene), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,alpha = .2, fill = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(Sox2_gene), end(Sox2_gene)), col = 'red'),
    #geom_vline(xintercept = start(CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra), col = 'darkgrey',linetype = 'dotted'),
    #geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_8), col = 'darkgrey'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_23), col = 'darkgrey')
  ) +

  ## plot the confidence interval based on the resampled data
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = expr_score_window_lower_sel, ymax = expr_score_window_upper_sel, fill = strand), alpha = 0.2) +
  #geom_line( aes(y = expr_score_window_mean), col = 'orange') +
  ## plot the median based on the resampled data
  geom_line(aes(y = expr_score_window_median_sel, col = strand)) +

  #axes
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), labels = scales::unit_format(scale = 1E-6, accuracy = 0.01, unit=NULL),
                     limits=prange_ChIP, expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n=6),
                     limits = c(0, 25500)) +
  labs(x='Genomic coordinate (Mb)',y='expression score') +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = 'top') +
  theme(axis.title.y=element_blank())

pExpr_23_MK01_C5_str


#3xCBS_Rv_Sox2P - MK02
pExpr_23_MK02_C2_str =
ggplot(expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_MK02_C2_str, aes(x = mid_interval)) +
  # annotate enhancer
  list(
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(enhancer), xmax = end(enhancer), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = brown),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(enhancer), end(enhancer)), col = brown),
    # annotate gene
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(Sox2_gene), xmax = end(Sox2_gene), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,alpha = .2, fill = 'red'),
    #geom_vline(xintercept = start(CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra), col = 'darkgrey',linetype = 'dotted'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(Sox2_gene), end(Sox2_gene)), col = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_23), col = 'darkgrey')
  ) +

  ## plot the confidence interval based on the resampled data
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = expr_score_window_lower_sel, ymax = expr_score_window_upper_sel, fill = strand), alpha = 0.2) +
  #geom_line( aes(y = expr_score_window_mean), col = 'orange') +
  ## plot the median based on the resampled data
  geom_line(aes(y = expr_score_window_median_sel, col = strand)) +

  #axes
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), labels = scales::unit_format(scale = 1E-6, accuracy = 0.01, unit=NULL),
                     limits=prange_ChIP, expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n=6),
                     limits = c(0, 25500)) +
  labs(x='Genomic coordinate (Mb)',y='expression score') +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = 'top') +
  theme(axis.title.y=element_blank())

pExpr_23_MK02_C2_str


#1xCBS_Fw_Sox2P - MK03
pExpr_23_MK03_C1_str =
ggplot(expr_score_sum_tib_filt_comb_23_MK03_C1_str, aes(x = mid_interval)) +
  # annotate enhancer
  list(
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(enhancer), xmax = end(enhancer), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2, fill = brown),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(enhancer), end(enhancer)), col = brown),
    # annotate gene
    annotate("rect", xmin = start(Sox2_gene), xmax = end(Sox2_gene), ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,alpha = .2, fill = 'red'),
    #geom_vline(xintercept = start(CTCF_mm10.chr3_extra), col = 'darkgrey',linetype = 'dotted'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(start(Sox2_gene), end(Sox2_gene)), col = 'red'),
    geom_vline(xintercept = start(landingPad_23), col = 'darkgrey')
  ) +

  ## plot the confidence interval based on the resampled data
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = expr_score_window_lower_sel, ymax = expr_score_window_upper_sel, fill = strand), alpha = 0.2) +
  #geom_line( aes(y = expr_score_window_mean), col = 'orange') +
  ## plot the median based on the resampled data
  geom_line(aes(y = expr_score_window_median_sel, col = strand)) +

  #axes
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), labels = scales::unit_format(scale = 1E-6, accuracy = 0.01, unit=NULL),
                     limits=prange_ChIP, expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n=6),
                     limits = c(0, 25500)) +
  labs(x='Genomic coordinate (Mb)',y='expression score') +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = 'top') +
  theme(axis.title.y=element_blank())

pExpr_23_MK03_C1_str
```


## Figure S2F-I, Plot dataset
```{r Figure S2F-I Plot expression scores with ChIP seq data}
library(Signac)

prange_ChIP_paper_gr = GRanges(seqnames = "chr3", IRanges(start = prange_ChIP[1], end = prange_ChIP[2]))

# Plot for figure
ext_data_files_ls_figure = split(unname(paths_ext_data_files_figure), names(paths_ext_data_files_figure))

#Plot for pME034
cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = c(list(pExpr_23_34A_str,       
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[1], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)),
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[2], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)),
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[5], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)),
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[6], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)),
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[4], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)),
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[3], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)))),
                   ncol = 1, align="v", axis="lr", rel_heights = c(1.5, 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 0.3))


#Plot for MK01
cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = c(list(pExpr_23_MK01_C5_str,       
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[1], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)),
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[2], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)),
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[5], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)),
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[6], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)),
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[4], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)),
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[3], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)))),
                   ncol = 1, align="v", axis="lr", rel_heights = c(1.5, 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 0.3))


#Plot for MK02
cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = c(list(pExpr_23_MK02_C2_str,       
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[1], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)),
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[2], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)),
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[5], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)),
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[6], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)),
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[4], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)),
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[3], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)))),
                   ncol = 1, align="v", axis="lr", rel_heights = c(1.5, 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 0.3))


#Plot for MK03
cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = c(list(pExpr_23_MK03_C1_str,       
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[1], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)),
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[2], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)),
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[5], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)),
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[6], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)),
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[4], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)),
                                     BigwigTrack(prange_ChIP_paper_gr, ext_data_files_ls_figure[3], smooth = 500) + 
                                       scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3), expand= c(0,0)))),
                   ncol = 1, align="v", axis="lr", rel_heights = c(1.5, 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 0.3))

```
